description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to build with different combinations of OS (ubuntu-22.04, macos-12), compiler (g++-11, clang++-16, clang++-17), build type (Release, Debug), and cache (Redis or none). For each job, check out the code, install dependencies based on the OS, compile using a build script, and run tests with ninja.
